text: The surgeon uses a micro needle holder to stabilize a grape marked with a line, then articulates micro scissors to cut along the line with precision using the Da Vinci robotic system.
The robotic system is set to ultra fine mode, allowing precise cutting along the marked lines on the grape using micro scissors, demonstrating the motion scaling capability.

The Da Vinci robotic system is used to precisely cut the skin of a grape with micro scissors, while a micro needle holder stabilizes the grape. The skin is carefully peeled off, demonstrating the precision achievable with robotic assistance.
Two micro-dental holders are used to stabilize the grape while the skin is peeled off smoothly, demonstrating the precision and tremor-free capabilities of the Da Vinci robotic system.
